headline: Is Capital One Financial (COF) Still Attractive After Its Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: If you are wondering whether Capital One Financial stock still offers value at its current price, this article lays out the key signals to watch before you commit fresh capital. The share price recently closed at US$199.43, with returns of 8.4% over 30 days, 14.6% over 1 year, 122.2% over 3 years and 51.2% over 5 years. However, the year to date return of a 19.6% decline highlights that sentiment has not moved in a straight line. Recent news coverage has focused on Capital One Financial in...
